speaker: system
text: Thank you for calling Acme Corporation. Your call is important to us. Please hold while I transfer you to the requested extension.

speaker: rep
text: Hey John, this is Sarah from PhoneBurner. How's it going?

speaker: prospect
text: Good, what can I do for you?

speaker: rep
text: I'm reaching out because I saw your team is growing the outbound sales org. We make a power dialer that helps reps make 4x more calls per hour. Is that something you'd want to hear about?

speaker: prospect
text: Actually yeah, we've been looking at dialers. What would the next steps look like to get a demo set up?

speaker: rep
text: So our platform integrates with most CRMs out of the box. We support Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, and about 20 others. The setup typically takes less than a day.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay but how much does it cost? We have about 30 reps.

speaker: rep
text: For a team of 30, you'd be looking at our Professional tier. I can put together a custom quote. Let me get your email and I'll send over everything.

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, it's john at acme dot com.

speaker: rep
text: Perfect. I'll have that over to you by end of day. Thanks John.
